options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage <slew_value> # Transition time to be annotated to the selected pins or ports (float, required) <port_or_pin_list> # List of pins or ports to be annotated with the transition time that you specify using the slew_value parameter

options.name: -fall
options.description: Transition value is set for falling transition time

options.name: -max
options.description: Transition value is set for maximum transition time

options.name: -min
options.description: Transition value is set for minimum transition time

options.name: -rise
options.description: Transition value is set for rising transition time
